creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Which port exactly (category/name)? databases/rrdtool is version 1.7.2 last I checked. There is a databases/rrdtool12.

Is this affecting cmake -- the bug title says "when compiling cmake" -- or rrdtool -- the bug text says "when compiling .. with cmake" -- which are two very different things?

Neither rrdtool port uses cmake. The error in the bug report references a patch file that is not mentioned in distinfo in either port. I can't tell if that patch is supposed to apply to rrdtool, anyway. Regardless, this is a patch-size fetch error, not a code problem.
